claim_text: Conventional wheat N timing: three applications - at sowing (deep), at tillering (Z20-Z25), and start of heading (Z50) as N-recovery.

value.raw_value_text: while P application is automatically added at sowing (P applied as deep fertilizer), N application is prescribed before sowing, with three conventional applications: at sowing as deep fertilizer, at tillering stage (Z20 to Z25), and the start of the heading stage (Z50) as N-recovery fertilizer
